selected_topic: Four-legged heroes: international dog squad helps save lives after Venezuela earthquakes | KRDO
news_angle: International search-and-rescue dogs spent days sniffing out survivors trapped in rubble after powerful Venezuela earthquakes toppled nearly 200 buildings.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao leads a riotous, action-packed 'international dog squad' scene where dogs dressed like superpowered rescue heroes turn into literal 'sniffing machines' powered by giant noses. Hunk Mao, as the stylish commander-cat, wears a sleek black hoodie and cap with a dog whistle like a boss. Dogs are playfully digging through cartoon rubble shaped like cracked buildings marked 'Venezuela,' one carrying a tiny human figure on its back, another wearing aviator goggles, a third sniffing
image_prompt: A vibrant, square digital illustration in comic style featuring Hunk Mao, the charming orange tabby cat with sharp tabby markings and large expressive eyes, in the foreground dressed as the cool squad leader in a black hoodie and cap. Around him, a lively international dog rescue squad made up of various dog breeds wears superhero gear: goggles, capes, utility belts with scent detectors, and life vests. They are energetically sniffing and digging through colorful rubble blocks shaped as broken buildings labeled 'Venezuela Earthquake'. Background shows a distant city silhouette with trembling cracks and dust clouds, while two dogs carry a rescued tiny human with a smile. Hidden props include a tiny fire hydrant with a flag, paw-print badges shaped like rescue crosses, a toy skeleton buried under rubble with a funny hat, a bird dropping a tiny message scroll, and a toppled statue of a bone. One dog comically wears oversized sunglasses and a doggo GPS collar with a blinking red light. The bottom foreground has a discarded tennis ball labeled 'SEARCH ME!'. The entire scene bustles with kinetic energy and charm, emphasizing rescue teamwork with a lighthearted twist.
easter_eggs: Tiny fire hydrant decorated as a flag holder
Toy skeleton buried in rubble wearing a goofy hat
A bird dropping a tiny scroll as a secret message
Dog with oversized sunglasses and blinking GPS collar
Paw-print shaped rescue badges pinned on dog collars
Discarded tennis ball labeled 'SEARCH ME!' at feet
Miniature earthquake fault lines drawn on rubble blocks
caption: After powerful Venezuela earthquakes toppled nearly 200 buildings, international dog squads sniffed out survivors buried in the rubble. Hunk Mao’s squad says: who needs superpowers when you’ve got super sniffs and paws of steel?
risk_notes: No financial or investment advice included. All factual claims based on verified news event about Venezuela earthquake rescue dogs.
